name: Lanai
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is a Martha Stewart article explaining what a lanai architectural feature is.
description_long: DIAGNOSIS: This entry appears to be a data error. The URL provided (https://www.marthastewart.com/what-is-a-lanai-8647489) links to an educational article from Martha Stewart Living about architectural design, not a financial services company. The content is entirely about lanais—outdoor covered rooms originating in Hawaiian architecture, their evolution, and how they differ from porches and patios. There is no financial product, lending service, credit offering, or consumer finance solution of any kind described on this page. The article features expert commentary from architects about structural characteristics, regional popularity in warm-weather states, and design considerations. This is pure home improvement and architectural education content. There is no company called 'Lanai' operating as a financial services provider on this domain. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is completely incorrect and suggests either a database error, a mismatched URL entry, or a test of data validation protocols. CreditDoc should remove this entry or provide corrected information linking to an actual financial services company, as this profile cannot be completed with factual information about consumer finance services.
